channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gen Z was skeptical about employment before entering the workforce, psychologists say that outlook has worsened
item.description: The children of the Great Recession's foreclosure crisis are at risk of giving up on themselves.

item.title: C.H. Robinson's CEO applies Lean principles to AI transformation, calling it a game-changer for the company
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: $29 billion stock offering this week will test investor appetite for AI companies
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: Former Trump official: Federal Pell Grants now cover welding school, but new rules create obstacles
item.description: For the first time in 50 years, federal aid will fund short job-training programs, but new regulations make it harder for those programs to survive.
